commands: sudo bash -lc 'set -e; cd /opt/innercircle/backend; export LANG=C.UTF-8; export LC_ALL=C.UTF-8; export CI=1; export NO_COLOR=1; export PRISMA_HIDE_UPDATE_MESSAGE=1; npm run db:generate > /tmp/db_generate.log 2>&1; npm run build > /tmp/build.log 2>&1; sudo systemctl restart innercircle-backend; tail -n 20 /tmp/build.log | tr -cd "\11\12\15\40-\176"'
